role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained within domain constraints.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and lighting cues appropriate to the role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant types (dwarf birch, willow) and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road markings, shoulder width, and marker posts.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain features like camera generation and specific infrastructure styles.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their domains, provided image-grounded evidence, and correctly identified Iceland as the primary candidate. The final prediction matches the ground truth.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of scrub, soil, and horizon match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Plant descriptions are consistent with the visible vegetation.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road markings and posts described accurately.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Camera artifacts and infrastructure details match.
